anime_pulse_items.title: One Piece Chapter 1134: Luffy vs. Imu Final Battle Begins?
anime_pulse_items.summary: Spoilers for One Piece chapter 1134 leaked, revealing Luffy's final confrontation with Imu. The chapter features an epic Gear 5 clash and a shocking revelation about the Void Century. Release date May 5, 2026.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note New Anime Movie Announced by Netflix: 'Death Note: Rebirth'
anime_pulse_items.summary: Netflix announces a new Death Note anime movie titled 'Death Note: Rebirth', set 10 years after the original. Directed by Tetsuro Araki, release date December 2026. Light Yagami's legacy continues.

anime_pulse_items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3 Premiere Date Revealed: July 2026
anime_pulse_items.summary: Crunchyroll announces Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3 will premiere July 15, 2026. The Culling Game arc adaptation begins. New key visual features Yuji and Megumi.

anime_pulse_items.title: Demon Slayer Infinity Castle Movie Breaks Box Office Records
anime_pulse_items.summary: Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle movie earns $500 million globally in first weekend. Highest-grossing anime film of 2026. Fans praise the animation quality and emotional ending.

anime_pulse_items.title: Attack on Titan Post-Finale Spin-Off Manga Announced
anime_pulse_items.summary: Attack on Titan: The Last Walls spin-off manga series announced, focusing on Levi's life after the finale. First chapter releases June 1, 2026 in Bessatsu Shonen Magazine.

anime_pulse_items.title: My Hero Academia Final Arc: Deku vs. Shigaraki Climax Revealed
anime_pulse_items.summary: My Hero Academia manga chapter 420 reveals Deku's new quirk awakening and the final battle against Shigaraki. Series ending in 5 chapters. Fans in tears.

anime_pulse_items.title: Chainsaw Man Season 2 Teaser Trailer Drops: Denji vs. Chainsaw Church
anime_pulse_items.summary: MAPPA releases teaser for Chainsaw Man Season 2, showing Denji fighting the Chainsaw Church. Premiere October 2026. New characters revealed.

anime_pulse_items.title: Spy x Family Season 3 Premieres August 2026 on Crunchyroll
anime_pulse_items.summary: Crunchyroll confirms Spy x Family Season 3 starts August 10, 2026. New arc introduces Anya's mysterious past. Key visual released.

anime_pulse_items.title: Frieren Wins Anime of the Year at Crunchyroll Awards 2026
anime_pulse_items.summary: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End sweeps Crunchyroll Anime Awards 2026, winning Anime of the Year, Best Director, and Best Score. Season 2 hype intensifies.

anime_pulse_items.title: Solo Leveling Season 2 Release Date Confirmed: June 2026
anime_pulse_items.summary: Solo Leveling Season 2 announced for June 20, 2026 on Crunchyroll. New trailer shows Jeju Island arc. Voice actors return.

anime_pulse_items.title: Naruto 25th Anniversary Exhibition Opens in Tokyo
anime_pulse_items.summary: Naruto 25th anniversary exhibition opens in Tokyo, featuring original art, interactive displays, and exclusive merchandise. Over 10,000 tickets sold in first day.

anime_pulse_items.title: Boruto: Two Blue Vortex Chapter 15: Kawaki's Betrayal Deepens
anime_pulse_items.summary: Boruto: Two Blue Vortex chapter 15 reveals Kawaki's true plan to destroy Konoha. Sarada awakens new Mangekyo ability. Release May 5.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dragon Ball Daima Episode 5: Mini Goku vs. Gomah
anime_pulse_items.summary: Dragon Ball Daima episode 5 airs on Crunchyroll, featuring Mini Goku's fight against King Gomah. New transformation teased. Fan theories explode.

anime_pulse_items.title: Netflix Live-Action One Piece Season 2 Casting Announced
anime_pulse_items.summary: Netflix reveals cast for One Piece live-action season 2: Chopper and Robin actors chosen. Production begins June. Release early 2027.

anime_pulse_items.title: Crunchyroll Adds 'The Apothecary Diaries' Season 2 Simulcast
anime_pulse_items.summary: Crunchyroll announces simulcast of The Apothecary Diaries Season 2 starting May 10, 2026. First episode available immediately.

anime_pulse_items.title: Reddit Hypes 'Dandadan' Anime Adaptation Trailer
anime_pulse_items.summary: Reddit explodes over Dandadan anime adaptation trailer by Science SARU. Premiere October 2026. Fans call it 'most anticipated'.

anime_pulse_items.title: Netflix's 'Bastard!!' Season 2 Drops: Heavy Metal Dark Fantasy
anime_pulse_items.summary: Netflix releases Bastard!! Season 2 on May 4, 2026. All episodes available. Fans praise the return of classic anime style.
